ksa_text: Knowledge of AI explainability and interpretability methods, including SHAP values, LIME, partial dependence plots, counterfactual explanations, attention visualization, and the appropriate application of each method type by model class and explanation requirement.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of test procedures, principles, and methodologies (e.g., Capabilities and Maturity Model Integration (CMMI)).

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of language processing tools and techniques

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Knowledge of language processing tools and techniques
Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Knowledge of test procedures, principles, and methodologies (e.g., Capabilities and Maturity Model Integration (CMMI)).

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: AI Governance falls outside the primary competency scope of the Domain Data Lead. This knowledge KSA does not align with the role's core responsibilities and is excluded.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Is AI Governance truly out-of-scope for the Domain Data Lead? Emerging role definitions may include broader competency expectations.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Current job market analysis and framework definitions (DCWF, DDAT, NICE) do not list AI Governance as a core or recommended competency for the Domain Data Lead. Role scope exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence confirms AI Governance falls outside the established competency profile for the Domain Data Lead. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: AI Governance is outside the competency scope of the Domain Data Lead. All evaluation passes consistently support exclusion.
